title: BioIntel free public API sources
productLaw: Free public APIs only. Evidence-first; not regulatory decision support. Endpoints may require optional free keys (e.g. openFDA rate limit, College Scorecard DEMO_KEY).

sources.description: AlphaFold protein structure predictions
NHGRI Analysis Visualization and Informatics Lab-space
arXiv preprint server for physics, math, and biology
Bgee gene expression evolution database
BindingDB measured protein-ligand binding affinities
BioCyc collection of organism-specific pathway/genome databases
FDA-licensed biologics and biosimilar BLA applications via openFDA Drugs@FDA (sponsors, products, marketing status)
BioModels database of computational models of biological processes
BioSamples biological sample metadata repository
Therapeutic Target Database associations (free BioThings KP)
CATH protein domain classification and Gene3D
Chemical Entities of Biological Interest ontology
ChEMBL bioactivity database for drug discovery
ChEMBL drug indications data
ChEMBL mechanism of action data for drugs
Chemical structure database via PubChem (ChemSpider requires API key)
ClinGen clinical variant resource
ClinicalTrials.gov registry of clinical studies
ClinVar aggregates information about genomic variation and its relationship to human health
Medicare Hospital General Information (registered US hospitals)
US college/university directory for research affiliation context (not admissions advice)
College Scorecard institution directory (costs/outcomes context optional; free api.data.gov DEMO_KEY)
CompTox Chemicals Dashboard for environmental and toxicological data
ToxCast high-throughput screening data via CompTox Dashboard
Clinical Pharmacogenetics Implementation Consortium guidelines
CrossRef DOI metadata and citation data

sources.apiName: CT.gov · ROR · CMS · Scorecard · RePORTER · Europe PMC
sources.description: Deterministic local join of free public profile data: ClinicalTrials.gov sponsors/sites, ROR orgs, CMS Care Compare hospitals, US College Scorecard, NIH RePORTER institutes, and literature row counts (Europe PMC / PubMed / OpenAlex). Not competitive rankings or clinical referral.
Comparative Toxicogenomics Database connecting chemicals, genes, and diseases
Comparative Toxicogenomics Database disease associations
Provides FDA drug labeling information
dbSNP database of single nucleotide polymorphisms
Drug-Gene Interaction Database aggregating drug-target relationships
DisGeNET gene-disease and variant-disease associations

Portal-first manufacturing / establishment deep links: Drug Establishments Current Registration (DRLS), FEI Portal, FDA inspections dashboard, and FDA.gov firm search. There is no free public API that joins every product to certified plants — search official registries by firm name. Not GMP advice or a certification graph.
DrugCentral: online drug information resource
Official EMA medicines Excel dump (biosimilar / orphan / ATMP flags, MAH, dates)
EU-facing medicine card from Open Targets GraphQL plus EMA portal/bulk deep links
Ensembl genome browser and annotation
Europe PMC life sciences literature database
Expression Atlas gene expression across species and conditions
FDA current and resolved drug shortage reports
FooDB database of food constituents and their bioactivities
Gene Ontology functional annotation terms via QuickGO
Gene3D protein domain classification via CATH
Gene Expression Omnibus functional genomics repository
Global Natural Products Social Molecular Networking platform
Global Substance Registration System (UNII substances)
GTEx tissue-specific gene expression data
Guide to Pharmacology database of drug targets and ligands
NHGRI-EBI GWAS Catalog of published genome-wide association studies
Human Metabolome Database of small molecule metabolites
US Medicare hospital directory (Care Compare) for affiliation context
Human Phenotype Ontology for clinical abnormalities
Immune Epitope Database and Analysis Resource
ImmPort immunology studies (free public search API)
IntAct molecular interaction database
InterPro protein domain and family classification
EPA IRIS RfD/RfC and critical effects via PubChem; CompTox for DTXSID identity
International Standard Randomised Controlled Trial Number registry
Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes pathway database
Biosynthesis and reaction pathway data from KEGG and Rhea
LINCS L1000 Connectivity Map perturbation signatures
LIPID MAPS comprehensive lipid classification database
Mass spectral database for compound identification
MassIVE mass spectrometry proteomics data repository
MedGen medical genetics terminology and concepts
Medical Subject Headings controlled vocabulary thesaurus
MetaboLights metabolomics experiments repository
Metabolomics data repository and analysis
Monarch Initiative cross-species phenotype-genotype associations
Integrated chemical annotation data from multiple sources
MyGene.info integrated gene annotation service
National Average Drug Acquisition Cost from Medicaid
NCATS Biomedical Data Translator for reasoning over biomedical data
NCBI Gene database of gene-specific information
NCI Thesaurus concepts (free public EVS; caDSR host deprecated)
NCI Thesaurus cancer-related terminology
NIH RePORTER extramural research project database
NINDS molecular mechanistic signature database
National Science Foundation awards by keyword (PI, org, abstract)
Ontology Lookup Service for ontology term search
Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man genetic disorder catalog
Open Targets Platform for drug-target-disease associations
OpenAlex open scholarly metadata catalog
OpenCitations open scholarly citation data
Open data API for FDA drug, device, and food adverse events, recalls, and labeling
Drug enforcement reports and recalls via OpenFDA
FAERS adverse event reports via OpenFDA
Side-effect reaction labels from openFDA FAERS (SIDER dumps are not free JSON; panel is SIDER-compatible)
Structured SPL sections (boxed warning, AE, interactions) via free openFDA
NDA/ANDA/BLA applications and products from free openFDA Drugs@FDA
National Drug Code directory via OpenFDA
Approved Drug Products with Therapeutic Equivalence Evaluations
Orphanet rare disease and orphan drug information
PatentsView patent data for biomedical research
Pathway Commons integrated pathway and interaction data
PDBe ligand and chemical component data
PeptideAtlas proteomics repository
Pharmacogenomics knowledge base for drug-gene relationships
Pharos Illuminating the Druggable Genome target data
PRIDE proteomics identification database
Human Protein Atlas tissue and cell expression data
EBI Proteins API variation and feature data
EBI Proteins API cross-references
PubChem BioAssay repository of screening and assay data
PubChem GHS hazard classification data
PubChem compound physicochemical properties
PubMed biomedical literature citation database
Licensed biologics and biosimilar family roles from free FDA sources
Purple Book monthly CSV downloads — licensed biologics, biosimilar and interchangeable labels
Purple Book BPPT patent list (sponsor-submitted patents for certain reference biologics)
Gene Ontology functional annotation terms via QuickGO
Protein Data Bank 3D structure archive
Reactome pathway database for biological pathways

sources.organization: EMA · MHRA · TGA · PMDA · Health Canada · FDA
sources.description: Portal-first international medicines regulator deep links (UK MHRA, AU TGA, JP PMDA, EU EMA, Health Canada, US FDA). Official public search / download URLs only — no scrape. Not clinical decision support.
CC0 research organization IDs matched from trial sponsors/sites and related names
EU multi-country ROR packs (education, healthcare, facility types)
ATC drug classification via RxNorm/RxClass
RxNorm provides normalized names for clinical drugs
Structural Antibody Database
PubChem molecule search and resolution
SEC EDGAR corporate filing data for pharmaceutical companies
Semantic Scholar academic paper search and citation data
PubChem similarity and identity search
Small Molecule Pathway Database of human metabolic pathways
STITCH chemical-protein interaction network database
STRING protein-protein interaction network database
UniChem cross-references between chemical databases
Universal Protein Resource for protein sequence and function data
IPEDS directory via Education Data Portal (UNITID lookup, no key)
WikiPathways curated biological pathway database
